title: SELF-REFINE: Iterative Refinement with Self-Feedback

defines.name: SELF-REFINE
defines.definition: An iterative self-refinement algorithm that improves an LLM's initial output by repeatedly generating self-feedback and using that feedback to refine the output.

problem: LLMs often produce suboptimal initial outputs and existing refinement methods typically require supervised data, extra training, or external reward models.
